attributes.title: [CockroachDB OTel] Storage
attributes.description: Storage capacity, LSM tree health, and disk I/O metrics. Monitor capacity usage, admission IO overload, L0 sublevels, read amplification, and write stalls.

This dashboard monitors storage and LSM health:
- Capacity used, available, and utilization
- IO admission overload (>1.0 = overloaded)
- L0 sublevels and file count (compaction health)
- Read amplification (should be single digits)
- Write stalls and disk I/O queue depth
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "74117d03-dce4-ba18-82f3-3963920a84ae", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 8, "h": 4, "i": "74117d03-dce4-ba18-82f3-3963920a84ae"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Capacity Used %", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "25ff9254-1fce-4b7e-60ae-dc06ea0441ab", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "476559d7-6cca-aaf6-90ac-0161d71872ff", "showBar": false}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-cockroachdb.otel-*
